calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-07-2014 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-31-2014 Continued To Mar-26-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-15-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:Attorney Pamela Bobowski (415-518-2136) for Sandra Kissig the moving party.
No Appearance by the opposing party.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT ARTHUR CAYABYAB, DAN CAYABYAB and RYAN CAYABYAB's MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT is GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. Motion is GRANTED (1) as to causes of action 2, 3, 4 and 9. These causes of action arise out of protective activity of service of purportedly defective and non-complaint notices of termination of tenancy; and (2) as to causes of action 14 and 15. These are mixed causes of action arising out of protected and non-protected activity, plaintiffs failed to show probability of prevailing on the merits on any part of these causes of action. Motion is DENIED as to causes of action 1, 5, 6, 7, 8, 10, 11, 12, 13, 16, 17. Moving party failed to shift burden and show that these causes of action and/or harm alleged in these causes of action (See Salma) is based upon or results from protected activity. Plaintiffs' request for sanctions is denied. Plaintiffs failed to show that defendants' motion is frivolous within the meaning of CCP 128.5. Order signed and filed in open court. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk J. Rumsey, Not Reported. (501)

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-19-2013 Continued To Jan-15-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS ARTHUR CAYABYAB, DAN CAYABYAB, and RYAN CAYABYAB'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT IS Transferred to Department 501, the Real Property/Housing Court, to be heard on January 15, 2014, at 9:30 am. See San Francisco Local Rule 8.10. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Court Reporter: Tony Vaughn, CSR #6185
